steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is the word stockade, which is singular. The sentence also parallels the later phrase cinch derives, so the blank needs a singular present-tense verb.

steps.title: Reject nonagreeing verbs
steps.content:
• Choice A uses plural have and does not agree with the singular subject.
  • Choice B uses plural were and an unsuitable progressive form.
  • Choice C is the plural/base present form.

steps.title: Use the singular verb
steps.content: Derives agrees with the singular subject the word stockade and matches the parallel verb in cinch derives. The answer is D.
